wordplay_note: Fanatic who seeks a tenth planet
card_description: Leon Cartwright is a character in Philip K. Dick's *Solar Lottery*. Follower of John Preston's cult seeking the mythical Domus. Name note: Fanatic who seeks a tenth planet. Faith in an undiscovered world — the religious impulse as space exploration. First appears in *Solar Lottery*.

reference.brief: Follower of John Preston's cult seeking the mythical Domus
reference.significance: Faith in an undiscovered world — the religious impulse as space exploration
